title: BlockDefinitionDocument
description: Is a block definition with description, components, and permutations.

permutations.title: Permutations
permutations.description:
Array of conditional component overrides. Each permutation has a Molang condition and components that override the base components when the condition is true.

Properties:
• components (object)
• condition

components.title: Components
components.description:
Properties:
• minecraft:breathability (object)
• minecraft:chest_obstruction (object)
• minecraft:collision_box (boolean)
• minecraft:connection_rule (object)
• minecraft:crafting_table (object)
• minecraft:destructible_by_explosion (boolean)
• minecraft:destructible_by_mining (boolean)
• minecraft:destruction_particles (object)
• ... and 38 more properties
components.x-runtime-constraint-description: Block cannot have both "minecraft:redstone_producer" and "minecraft:redstone_consumer" components.

description.title: Description
description.description:
Information about the block, must have at minimum an "identifier" and can have also the following optional field "menu_category", "states" and/or "traits"

• menu_category (object)
